title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 3
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear customer and assistant talking about the birthday meal.
items.audio_script: Customer: Hi, Ben. I’m checking the plan for the birthday meal. I thought we were going to eat at the pizza place, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Assistant: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]We’re going to the café by the river instead[/1]. || Customer: Good thing I asked. I nearly walked straight to the restaurant. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Assistant: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: customer
dialogue.text: Hi, Ben. I’m checking the plan for the birthday meal. I thought we were going to eat at the pizza place, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. We’re going to the café by the river instead.

dialogue.speaker: customer
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly walked straight to the restaurant. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: assistant
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, fast food counter in shopping centre, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “We’re going to the café by the river instead.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear woman and man talking about the online lesson.
items.audio_script: Woman: Hi, Emma. I’m checking the plan for the online lesson. I thought we were going to start at six fifteen, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Man: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]It starts at quarter to seven, not quarter past six[/1]. || Woman: Good thing I asked. I nearly logged in too early. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Man: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.
